🗖 nosplit | ⇓ toc | 153, 2k, 124k
🔗
Software engineer. Passion for computers, natural sciences and education. Opinions are his own.
🔗
GitHub | Stack Overflow | LinkedIn | YouTube | Twitter | Zhihu 知乎 | Weibo 微博 | Other accounts
🔗
You can sponsor Ciro Santilli at https://github.com/sponsors/cirosantilli starting from 1$/month so he can work full time on Write free books to get famous website and develop hardcore university-level STEM education for all ages.
🔗
This website is written in Cirodown and its source code is located at: https://github.com/cirosantilli/cirosantilli.github.io.
